title: Shobay #7630
definition:
Shobai = "glorious"

 1) ancestor of a family of doorkeepers of the temple who returned with
    Zerubbabel
nasbUsage:

 1) ancestor of a family of doorkeepers of the temple who returned with
    Zerubbabel

    NASB:  head of a family of gatekeepers
